response:
Emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. On Thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town, bringing the total number of dogs to 29. On Friday, a family brought in a stray dog, increasing the total to 30. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, reducing the total number of dogs to 24. 

*** 

The number of dogs in Emily's rescue center has been affected by several factors. The initial count of 25 dogs was increased by 4 puppies on Thursday, resulting in 29 dogs. The addition of a stray dog on Friday brought the total to 30. However, on Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which reduced the total number of dogs to 24. 

[address] is the location of Emily's rescue center. [date] is the date when the puppies were received. [time] is the time when the stray dog was brought in. [number] is the number of dogs adopted on Saturday. [total] is the total number of dogs in the rescue center after all the changes. [result] is the final number of dogs in the rescue center.
